items.title: Style consultation
items.desc: Are you unsure which look truly suits your style and lifestyle? We analyse your hair structure, wishes and possibilities in detail.

items.title: Extensions consultation
items.desc: We assess extensions method, quality, length and blend for your hair. Honest advice on maintenance, longevity and the best option for you.

items.title: Haircut & Styling
items.desc: Consultation, deep conditioning treatment, haircut & styling.

items.title: Haircut & Styling (Long/Thick Hair)
items.desc: Consultation, deep conditioning treatment, haircut & styling.

items.title: Blowdry
items.desc: Consultation, deep conditioning treatment, blowdry and/or waves.

items.title: Blowdry (Long/Thick Hair)
items.desc: Consultation, deep conditioning treatment, blowdry and/or waves.

items.title: Color Package - S
items.desc: Consultation, root color, deep conditioning treatment, haircut & styling. Ideal for covering grey roots or refreshing the root color.

items.title: Color Package - M
items.desc: Consultation, root color, deep conditioning treatment, haircut & styling. Ideal for root refresh and color balance through the lengths.

items.title: Blonde Package - S
items.desc: Consultation, highlights/balayage, gloss, Olaplex, deep conditioning, haircut and styling. Ideal for refreshing the blonde at the parting and hairline.

items.title: Blonde Package - M
items.desc: Consultation, highlights/balayage, gloss, Olaplex, deep conditioning, haircut and styling. Ideal for refreshing blonde all over.

items.title: Blonde Package - L
items.desc: Consultation, highlights/balayage, gloss, Olaplex, deep conditioning, haircut and styling. Ideal for a complete new look or color correction.

items.title: Gloss Package - S
items.desc: Consultation, gloss, deep conditioning, haircut and styling. Ideal for refreshing blonde tone. Highlights not included.

items.title: Gloss Package - M
items.desc: Consultation, gloss, deep conditioning, haircut and styling. Ideal for refreshing tone and blending regrowth.

items.title: OLAPLEX Express Treatment
items.desc: A quick strengthening treatment to refresh hair health.

items.title: OLAPLEX Rebuild Treatment
items.desc: Intensive rebuilding treatment to restore structure and shine.

items.title: Deep Hydration Treatment
items.desc: A moisture-rich ritual for soft, silky hair.

items.title: SOS Repair Treatment
items.desc: Targeted repair for fragile, damaged lengths.

items.desc: Precision maintenance for one row of hair extensions.

items.desc: Precision maintenance for two rows of extensions.

items.title: Weft Maintenance - 3 Rows

items.title: Style-Beratung
items.desc: Unsicher, welcher Look zu deinem Stil und Lebensstil passt? Wir analysieren Haare, Wünsche und Möglichkeiten genau.

items.title: Extensions-Beratung
items.desc: Wir bewerten Methode, Qualität, Länge und Harmonie der Extensions zu deinem Haar. Ehrliche Einschätzung zu Pflege und Haltbarkeit.
